lemmas.translation: this, that; he, she, it, etc.
come to believe in, trust in
set one’s mind on; make a resolution or wish
for seven days, for a week

sequences.label: Anavatapta-gatha: Introductory Verses and Recitation of Mahākāśyapa
pāda B
sequences.translation: [1] (*in Śrāvastī)...

sequences.label: pāda A
sequences.translation: [2] Frequented by fierce yakṣas, charming

sequences.label: pāda D
sequences.translation: [3] [whence] the waters reach ... (*in four directions).

sequences.label: pāda C
sequences.translation: [4] ... except [those] who have attained supernatural power.

sequences.label: pāda D
sequences.translation: Come now, we will go to that (*lake) ...

sequences.label: pāda B
sequences.translation: [5] of the Great Sage, the Incomparable Saviour

sequences.label: pāda A
sequences.translation: [6] Having gone there, he...

sequences.label: pāda C
sequences.translation: [8] That Kāśyapa, a disciple of the Incomparable One,

sequences.label: pāda D
sequences.translation: (*told of his) previous births ...

sequences.label: pāda B
sequences.translation: [9] “I gave a gift to a pratyekabuddha.

sequences.label: pāda C
sequences.translation: The pratyekabuddha ...

sequences.label: pāda A
sequences.translation: [10] And through him I came to believe in the supreme Dharma

sequences.label: pāda B
sequences.translation: and f(ixed) [my mind] on that Dharma ...

sequences.label: pāda D
sequences.translation: [11] And my lifetime among the Kurus ...

sequences.label: pāda C
sequences.translation: [12] (among) the long-lived, ...

sequences.label: pāda B
sequences.translation: [13] one thousand times [I went] to [the realm of] the thirty-three, again and again,

sequences.label: pāda C
sequences.translation: with beautiful garlands, or(naments) ...

sequences.label: pāda A
sequences.translation: [14] [with] the ripening of that same karma ...

sequences.label: pāda C
sequences.translation: ... [15] very wealthy,

sequences.label: pāda D
sequences.translation: [but] indifferent to the types of five sensory pleasures.

sequences.label: pāda A
sequences.translation: ... [16] (ever) by me.

sequences.label: pāda B
sequences.translation: [Then] the robe of a disciple of the Conqueror was seen [by me].

sequences.label: pāda C
sequences.translation: Having made...

sequences.label: pāda A
sequences.translation: Having renounced the world, I saw

sequences.label: pāda B
sequences.translation: the Teacher ...

sequences.label: pāda C
sequences.translation: ... I honored [him]: [18]

sequences.label: pāda D
sequences.translation: ‘Venerable Sir, you are (*my) Teacher; I am [your] student.’
sequences.chaya: śāstā me bhadram te aham śrāvakaḥ asmi

sequences.label: pāda A
sequences.translation: [The Buddha said:] ‘Just so, as ...

sequences.label: pāda C
sequences.translation: [19] Listen to the sweet Dharma; I [will] tell [it] to you

sequences.label: pāda D
sequences.translation: if you wish ...’

sequences.label: pāda B
sequences.translation: [20] for just seven days, I was a person under instruction.

sequences.label: pāda C
sequences.translation: During that time ...

sequences.label: pāda A
sequences.translation: [21] [with] the final ripening of that same [karma]

sequences.label: pāda B
sequences.translation: Śākyamuni, the Greatest of Men, was encountered

sequences.label: pāda A
sequences.translation: [with] the final ripening of that same karma,

sequences.label: pāda B
sequences.translation: [my] mind is liberated, [I am] free of mental harshness, free of (*the depravities)

sequences.label: pāda D
sequences.translation: ... [23] my (*encounter) with those who are free of mental harshness [and] with the Savior. ⟪[10-4]-3⟫

sequences.label: pāda A
sequences.translation: This was well said by the Saviour, [who is] free of mental harshness.

sequences.label: pāda B
sequences.translation: Thus, the Saviour ...

sequences.label: pāda C
sequences.translation: … (*the Tathā)gata. [24]

sequences.label: pāda D
sequences.translation: An excellent deed was done in previous births.

sequences.label: pāda A
sequences.translation: Greatest of all, uncon(*quered) ...

sequences.label: pāda B
sequences.translation: ... for one maintaining [25] (*proper behavior), as he desires.

sequences.label: pāda C
